Bugwere Coffee Company

Empowering Communities Through Sustainable Agriculture

Transforming rural livelihoods in Eastern Uganda through coffee, cocoa, and diversified farming programs.

15,000+

Lives impacted since 2023

Our Manifesto

We believe every farmer — regardless of land size — deserves the opportunity to build a prosperous and sustainable future.

Founded in 2023 in the Bugwere region of Eastern Uganda, we respond to a critical challenge: How can rural households with limited land still generate sustainable income? Our answer is a holistic, community-driven approach that combines high-value coffee and cocoa production with diversified income streams, expert agronomic support, and guaranteed market access.

Read Our Story

What We Do

Our Programs

View All Programs

Sustainable Coffee

High-value coffee production with guaranteed market access.

Cocoa Farming

Diversifying income with resilient cocoa crops and training.

Livestock Support

Piggery and poultry for steady, diversified income.

Agronomy Services

Expert training, extension services, and field support.

Community Development

Inclusive initiatives empowering families to thrive.

Lives Impacted

Explore Our Impact

Empowering Households

Our Transformative Agriculture Model

Our model is built to empower rural households through a complete, end-to-end agricultural support system. From seedling to market, we walk with farmers every step of the way.

Explore Our Model

Seedling Distribution

Quality coffee and cocoa seedlings delivered directly to every farmer household, ensuring the best start for their new farms.

Extension System

Dedicated field officers provide agronomic training, regular farm visits, and hands-on support throughout the growing season.

Market Access

Guaranteed buying programs that ensure farmers can sell their harvest at fair, transparent prices without middlemen.

Quality Assurance

Processing and quality standards that ensure Bugwere coffee and cocoa meet international benchmarks for export.

Financial Inclusion

Community SACCO savings groups that provide access to credit, savings, and financial safety nets for farming families.

Farmer Insurance

Rural risk protection that safeguards farmers against crop failure, disease, and climate shocks.

Community Voices

Stories from the Field

“Before BCC brought coffee seedlings to our village, I struggled to feed my family. Now I have a thriving farm and my children are in school.”

MG

Mama Grace

Coffee Farmer, Bugwere

“The training programs changed everything. I learned how to care for my cocoa plants properly, and my yields have doubled since joining.”

JW

James Wanyama

Cocoa Farmer, Pallisa

“The guaranteed market means I never worry about selling my harvest. BCC buys at fair prices, and I can plan for my family's future.”

SN

Sarah Namwanje

Coffee & Cocoa Farmer
